author: Matt Wardlaw
body:
Oh heck.

What the heck am I supposed to do now?

Enjoy your time off, yo!

author: Burgo
body: Heh. Thanks Matt :) I may be taking a break from posting, but I’ll still be _reading_, so don’t think this means YOU can slack off :P

author: Katy
body: hey there Matt, I just came across your blog.. I’m adding you to my links!! I hope your week off was fantastic.

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Katy,  
Thanks so much for stopping by the blog, and the kind words! Hope to see you around these parts more in the future :)
